title: Extreme Horde Moon
description: This add-on for Enhanced Celestials adds a tougher version of the Horde Moon
body:
![EX Horde Moon Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7f55a55e2bbf6aec96e32d777c75f17a18b56c3.png)
During the rare Extreme Horde Moon event, the weight of zombie spawns will be greatly increased, and all mob spawns will increase by a large amount as well, leading to a world overrun by the walking dead.

Not a big enough challenge, you say? Okay, well you asked for it. All zombies now have Strength 1 and Speed 1.
Still not enough? Fine. Now they have full iron armor and iron swords.


This is meant to be used with the regular [Horde Moon](https://modrinth.com/mod/horde-moon), but it isn't required.

Just for fun, try it with [The Hordes](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-hordes)



All credit for [Enhanced Celestials](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-celestials) goes to Corgi Taco.

Join [my Discord](https://discord.gg/kpN4eRbVsS)!
